description: Patch release: aligns ZCode-managed Trellis assets with ZCode's native `.zcode` layout for skills and agents.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(zcode): write ZCode-managed Trellis skills to `.zcode/skills/` instead of `.agents/skills/`, so local manually invoked skills live in the directory ZCode scans and ZCode no longer owns the shared agentskills.io compatibility root.
- fix(zcode): complete the ZCode sub-agent set by adding `trellis-research` under `.zcode/agents/`, and treat `.zcode` as sub-agent-capable when seeding task JSONL context files.
- fix(zcode): keep ZCode sub-agents under `.zcode/agents/` instead of the legacy `.zcode/cli/agents/` discovery path. Existing projects can run `trellis update --migrate` to move any installed legacy sub-agent directory.

**Migration:** ZCode users who initialized with `--zcode` on an earlier CLI version should run `trellis update --migrate` once to relocate `.zcode/cli/agents/` to `.zcode/agents/` if the legacy directory exists. New `trellis init --zcode` installs write the corrected `.zcode/skills/` and `.zcode/agents/` layout directly.

migrations.description: ZCode: move installed sub-agents from the legacy `.zcode/cli/agents/` directory to the new `.zcode/agents/` discovery path.
migrations.reason: ZCode dropped the intermediate `cli/` segment from its sub-agent discovery path. Trellis now writes to `.zcode/agents/`; this relocation keeps already-initialized projects consistent without leaving a stale directory behind.

notes:
No `--migrate` required for new installs.

ZCode users on an earlier CLI version (0.6.3–0.6.5) should run `trellis update --migrate` once to move `.zcode/cli/agents/` → `.zcode/agents/` if that legacy directory exists. `trellis update` also adds the new `.zcode/skills/` files and `trellis-research` agent through the normal template update path.

Projects that only used ZCode may remove stale `.agents/skills/` files after confirming no other configured platform still relies on the shared agentskills.io root.

Install: `npm install -g @mindfoldhq/trellis`
